_comment: Authorization reconstruction for the REAL Grok/Bankr drain transaction on Base mainnet (0x6fc7eb7da9379383efda4253e4f599bbc3a99afed0468eabfe18484ec525739a, May 2026, ~$175K in DRB). The spec is deliberately maximally permissive — the wallet may touch the DRB token with no amount cap — except for the one constraint any owner would sign: outputs stay with the owner's wallet. The execution data EIV validates is the real on-chain transaction; only this authorization is reconstructed (the original Bankr authorization is not public). All addresses are the real ones: 0xb105... is the drained Grok/Bankr wallet, 0x3ec2... is the DRB token.
